data.title: Sensient Technologies Corporation Reports Results for the Quarter Ended June 30, 2026
data.description: In Milwaukee, Sensient Technologies Corporation (NYSE: SXT), a prominent supplier of flavors and colors for the food, pharmaceutical, and personal care sectors, disclosed its financial outcomes for the quarter ending on June 30, 2026. The company announced that their revenue for the second quarter of 2026 surged by 11.6% to $462.1 million as compared to $414.2 million recorded in the same period last year. When evaluated in local currency, the revenue saw a 9.9% increase. Further details on operating...

data.title: Crescent Capital BDC, Inc. Schedules Earnings Release and Conference Call to Discuss its Second Quarter Ended June 30, 2026 Financial Results
data.description: On July 24, 2026, Crescent Capital BDC, Inc. (NASDAQ: CCAP) based in Los Angeles, disclosed plans to unveil its financial performance for the second quarter concluding on June 30, 2026, on August 10, 2026, following the closure of the market. Interested individuals are encouraged to participate in the webcast/conference call scheduled for August 11, 2026, at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time, to review the financial outcomes for the second quarter that ended on June 30, 2026.

data.title: Noodles & Company Announces Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: In the second quarter of 2026, there was a notable 10.3% growth in comparable restaurant sales. This increase was also reflected in the system-wide comparable restaurant sales.

data.title: Verizon Delivers Record 2Q26 Results as Strategic Transformation Ignites Accelerated Growth
data.description: Verizon has reported record-breaking results for the second quarter of 2026. The company's strategic transformation has led to significant growth across key metrics. As a result of this strong performance, Verizon has raised its full-year guidance.

data.title: Glass Lewis Joins ISS in Supporting XFLT's Proposal to Approve the King Street Sub-Advisory Agreement Ahead of Special Meeting
data.description: Two top proxy advisory firms have suggested that shareholders cast their votes in favor of the approval of the King Street Sub-Adviser using the WHITE card before the upcoming July 30th meeting.

data.title: SLB Announces Second-Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: SLB (NYSE: SLB) reported its second-quarter 2026 results with a revenue of $8,972 million, showing a 3% increase from the previous quarter and a 5% rise from the same period last year. The income before taxes on a GAAP basis was $1,018 million, reflecting a 6% increase from the previous quarter but a 21% decrease year-on-year. The income before taxes margin on a GAAP basis was 11.3%, up by 38 basis points from the previous quarter but down by 369 basis points from the same period the previous year. The net income attributable to SLB on a GAAP basis was $786 million.

data.title: International Seaways to Announce Second Quarter 2026 Results on August 10, 2026
data.description: International Seaways, Inc. (NYSE: INSW) has disclosed its intention to reveal its second quarter 2026 outcomes prior to market opening on Monday, August 10, 2026. A conference call for investors is scheduled at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. For the conference call on August 10, 2026, the dial-in numbers are as follows: United States: +1 (833) 461-5787, International: +1 (646) 884-3620, Conference ID 832 929 801.

data.title: Kontoor Brands Declares Quarterly Dividend
data.description: Kontoor Brands, Inc. (NYSE: KTB) based in Greensboro, N.C. has announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.53 per share for its common stock. The dividend is payable on September 18, 2026, to shareholders of record as of September 8, 2026. Kontoor Brands, Inc. is a conglomerate featuring three renowned lifestyle, outdoor, and workwear brands: Wrangler®, Lee®, and Helly Hansen.

data.title: ANI Pharmaceuticals to Discuss Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on August 7, 2026 at 8:00 a.m. ET
data.description: ANI Pharmaceuticals, Inc., based in Princeton, N.J., declared that it will unveil its financial results for the second quarter of 2026 on Friday, August 7, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The company is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ANIP.
